reference: Ɛmɔ nɩ́an bɛ́ nwʋn kpa, nán sʋanlan fɩ́ɩ́ a ngekele man ɛmɔ amanmuo m'ɔ fi kulo menian ngɛlɛ'n ɔ'a nnaka man ɛmɔ. Ngehele sɔ'n-mɔ, kulo menian'n-mɔ ɔ nʋn Abɔnsanmʋn nʋn yɩ́ sasʋ'n-mɔ yɛ̂ bɛ kekele ɔ, nan nán Kilisi y'ɔ kekele ɔ.

hypothesis: Mma se, ɛmɔle Krise, mɔdi tumi kɔa aso kɔɛni a, ane ɛmɔle like biara kɔa tɔ.

reference: Kʋn ɛyɔlɛ'n mɔ ɛmɔ nʋn Kilisi b'a yɔ'n, yɩ́ nzɔlɛ'n m'ɔ kele kɛ ɛmɔ nʋn yɩ́ tɩ kʋn'n, y'ɔ le ɛmɔ mmian nun ɛkpɛ'n. Mmian nun ɛkpɛ sɔ'n y'ɔ le nyɔlɩɛ ɛtɛ ɛtɛ'n-mɔ mɔ ɔ'a yɩ yɛ́ nun ɔ'a fite'n. Kilisi y'ɔ di junman sɔ nɩn ɔ, nán ɔ fi man kulo sʋanlan.
hypothesis: Kwɛrɛ alɛ mɔ, ɛmɔ nuhun Kresi ba yɛn, yɛn sɔrɛlɛ mɔ klɛkɛ ɛmɔ nuhun ɛte kwɛn, yɛli ɛmɔ mianun twɛn, mianun twɛn sɔn, yɛli nyɔliɛ tatɛ n mɔ, mɔ wa yiyɛ nu wa fitɛn, Kresi yɛ di juma sɔn yɔ, na ɔfi mɔ klɔ sɔn.

reference: Afɩ mɛlɛ mɔ bɛ sɔnɩnlɩn ɛmɔ'n, ɔ tɩ kɛ ɛmɔ nʋn Kilisi b'a wu. Yɛ̂ kɛmɔ ɛmɔ de di kɛ Nyanmɩan le tunmin ɔ'a man Kilisi fi ewue nun ɔ'a tinnge'n, ɔ tɩ kɛ ɛmɔ nʋn Kilisi bɛ fi ewue nun b'a tinnge.
hypothesis: A fɛ mɛlɛ mɔ bɛ sɔ ni ɛ mɔn. Ɔ ti kɛ ɛ mɔnɔ krisibawu. Yɛ kɛ mɔ ɔ ɛ mɔ dɛdii kɛ Nyami ɛlɛ tumi. Wa mɔ krisi fi ɛ wɔnɔ wɔ tingɛn. Ɔ ti kɛ ɛ mɔnɔ krisi bɛ fi ɛ wɔnɔ ba tingɛn.

reference: Ɛmɔ mɔ daba anɩn b'a wu wɔ bɛ́ ɛtɛ'n-mɔ anun'n, afɩ anɩn ɛmɔ tɩ man Nyanmɩan menian'n, sian dɩɛ, Nyanmɩan a nwun yɛ́ nwʋn anwunnvoe, ɔ'a man ɛmɔ nʋn Kilisi b'a nyan ngʋan. Ɔ'a fa yɛ́ ɛtɛ'n-mɔ kʋalaa ɔ'a hye yɛ́.
hypothesis: A mama daba, ani bawu wabe ten mo anun, afiani ema tema Nyame menian. Sia die, Nyame anwo yie wanvoe, wama ema no krisiba nyangoa, wafa ye ten mo kwa wose ye.

reference: Yɛ́ nyɔlɩɛ ɛtɛ ɛtɛ'n-mɔ tɩ kɛ kalɛ. Yɩ́ nwʋn kalata mɔ bɛ hɛlɛlɩ'n kele kɛ y'a tʋn mala. Yɩ́ ti, kalɛ sɔ'n dunman nun, ɔ sɛ kɛ bɛ kun yɛ́. Ɛhɩ, yɛ́ m'ɔ sɛ kɛ bɛ kun yɛ́'n, Kilisi a kaci yɛ́ ɔ'a man b'a hun yɩ́ kʋlʋwa nɩn asʋ yɛ́ kalɛ'n dunman nun.

reference: Kilisi a wu kʋlʋwa nɩn asʋ. Ɛbɛlɛ yɛ̂ Nyanmɩan sɩnlɩn ɔ lili mmɔnsanmʋn'n-mɔ asʋ kunnunmun ɔ lelɩ bɛ́ tunmin'n kʋalaa ɔ. Ɔ tɩ kɛ sahɩnlan mɔ ɔ'a li kunnunmun ɛlɔɛ nun ɔ lɛ fa yɩ́ nganga'n-mɔ kele bagua nɩn ɔ.

reference: Ɛhɩ kʋalaa tɩ kɛ like kpa'n m'ɔ lɛ ba'n wawɛ. Like kpa sɔ'n y'ɔ le Kilisi muonun.

reference: Yɩ́ ti, bɛ́ mɔ bɛ kulo bɛ́ nwʋn asɩ bɛbɛlɛ bɛ yɔ asɔnɩn bɛ sʋ nyanmɩansʋ mmɔfʋɛ'n-mɔ, mɔ ɛsɛ ninnge mɔ bɛ kɔ nwun yɩ́ wawɛ nun nɩn anwʋn cɩan bɛ́ kpa'n, sɛ bɛ kan bɛ kele ɛmɔ kɛ ɛmɔ a minlin, ɔ sanlɩn kɛ ɛmɔ nyɔ man ninnge sɔ'n-mɔ bie a, nán bɛ di yɩ́ nwʋn yalɛ. Bɛ tu bɛ́ nwʋn mgban, bɛ́ muonun bɛ́ ajʋnlɩn nɩn asʋ yɛ̂ bɛ di ɔ.

reference: Bɛ nva man bɛ́ nwʋn bɛ mmɔ man Kilisi m'ɔ li yɛ́ ti'n. Afɩ Asɔnɩn'n tɩ kɛ anwʋnnaan, yɩ́ ti'n y'ɔ le Kilisi. Yɩ́ lɩlɩ y'ɔ man anwʋnnaan'n like di, ɔ man ɔ tɩ akpɔlɛ ɔ nyin kɛ Nyanmɩan lɛ kpʋnndɛ yɩ́ nɩn ɔ.

reference: Ɛmɔ nʋn Kilisi b'a wu, bɛ nʋn mmɔnsanmʋn'n-mɔ mɔ bɛ sie mân nɩn afian a tɩ. Nan ɔ yɔ sɛ mɔ afɩ ɛmɔ bɔ bɛ́ abalabɔ'n kɛ ɛmɔ tɩ ɛtɛ mân'n dɩɛ'n? Ɔ yɔ sɛ mɔ mân'n mala'n nʋn yɩ́ ngehele'n-mɔ asʋ yɛ̂ ɛmɔ di'n?
hypothesis: a mò no krisibà o, bɛ nò mò sà mɔ mò bɛ siɛ mɔ nni a fia te na ɔ ya sɛ mɔ a fɛ, ɛ mò bɔ bɛ abara bɔ ni kɛ ɛ mò te ɛtɛ màn diɛ ni. Ɔ ya sɛ mɔ, màn nì m'ara nì, nɔ yi ngi kɛrɛn mɔ, a so yɛ ɛ mò di.

reference: Mân'n nwan: “N'ɛ fa ɛhɩ!”, “N'ɛ di ɛhɩ!”, “N'ɛ kan ɛhɩ!”.
hypothesis: manwa nafe nediahe nekenhe

hypothesis: Aliamo bedi bejebegwan iwo mara nungekele momanikele niani.

Bɛ yɔ bɛ́ nwʋn kɛ bɛ tɩ menian mɔ bɛ bɛbɛlɛ bɛ́ nwʋn asɩ bɛ kele bɛ́ nwʋnnaan'n yalɛ kpa. Nan ɛhɩ kʋalaa tɩ mgban. Ɔ sanlɩn kɛ ɔ man yɛ nni man yɛ́ abalabɔ ɛtɛ nɩn asʋ kunnunmun.
hypothesis: M’o kulo menian mo maran so m’o. Ebɛ se kɛ nglɛɛ jɔrɔ m’o fin nyami an lo. A fe kɛ bɛ kulo kɛ bɛ sɔ nyami an. Yɛ bɛ yɔ. Bɛ yɔ bɛ wun kɛ bɛ tumi mian m’o bɛbɛ bɛ wun asɛ, bɛ klɛ bɛ wun nan yɛ alɛ kpa, na ɛ kɛ ku a tɛ ngbɛn. O sɔ n kɛ, ɔ ma ye ni ma yɛ abara bɔ ɛ tɛ ni asɔkunumɔ.

reference: Ɛmɔ nʋn Kilisi bɛ fi ewue nun b'a tinnge. Yɩ́ ti, ɛmɔ kpʋ́nndɛ nyanmɩansʋ ɛlɔ ninnge'n-mɔ. Yɩ́ bʋ y'ɔ le kɛ ɛmɔ bɔ́ bala m'ɔ sɔ Nyanmɩan anyɩn. Afɩ nyanmɩansʋ ɛlɔ yɛ̂ Kilisi wɔ ɔ, ɔ tɩ Nyanmɩan fama sʋ.
hypothesis: ɛmɔ nɔn krise, bɛfiɛwɛn nɔn mɔ tingɛ iti. Ɛmɔ kpɔndɛ Nyame asolɔ ngen nɔmɔ. Ibu yɔlɛ kɛ ɛmɔ bɔ balamɔ sɔ Nyame anyi. Afɛ Nyame asolɔ yɛ krise wɔ. Ɔtɛ Nyame afamɔ.

reference: Ɔ man Zʋakɩ, Pɩɛlɩ (Sefasɩ) nʋn Zʋan mɔ anɩn bɛ tɩ kɛ asɔnɩn nɩn asʋ mgbain'n, bɛ nwunlɩn yɩ́ kɛ Nyanmɩan yɛ̂ ɔ falɩ junman sɔ'n wulalɩ mɩ́n sa nun ɔ. Yɛ kɔwa yɛ kɔ ha, ɔ kɔ sɔ yɛ nɔ a ke, bɛ mɔɔ bɛ ti mɛ nzufu n, bɛ afi an lo juman, wa yɛ sã nɔ. Yɛɛ bɛ mɔɔ bɛ ti nzufu n, bɛ afi an lo juman, wa bɛ kɔsɔ bɛ sã nɔ.

reference: Ɛjɔlɛ kʋnmgba ala yɛ̂ bɛ hanlɩn bɛ helelɩ yɛ́ ɔ. Bɛ́ nwan yɛ́ ti kácɩ Zoluzalɛmʋn Asɔnɩn nɩn anun ehianfʋɛ'n-mɔ. Ɛbɛlɛ ɛjɔlɛ sɔ'n dɩɛ, m mɔlɩ mɔndɩnlɩn kpa n nili.

reference: Anɩn Pɩɛlɩ nʋn bɛ́ mɔ bɛ tɩ man Zufʋ'n yɛ̂ ɔ di like ɔ. reference: Anianman Zufʋ ɛhɩnlɩn-mɔ kʋsʋ kɔ nɩan Pɩɛlɩ nyɔlɩɛ ɛtɛ sɔ nɩn asʋ. Baanabasɩ muonun kɔ fa yɩ́ nwʋn kɔ wula nyɔlɩɛ ɛtɛ sɔ nɩn anun bie.

reference: Nan mɔ n nwunlin kɛ bɛ́ ɛnanndɩɛ'n ngɔ man atɩn sʋ, mɔ ɛsɛ bɛ́ abalabɔ'n nʋn ananhɔlɛ Ɛjɔlɛkpa'n tɩ man kʋn'n, n gɔ bisa Pɩɛlɩ (Sefasɩ) bagua nɩn anyunnun ɛbɛlɛ kɛ: “Wɔ́ Pɩɛlɩ, ɛ tɩ Zufʋ, ɛ nʋn bɛ́ mɔ bɛ tɩ man Zufʋ'n yɛ̂ bɛ san ɔ. Nan afɩ ɔ yɔ sɛ mɔ ɛ kulo kɛ ɛ tinndin bɛ́ maan bɛ kaci Zufʋ ɔ?”

reference: Ɛhɩka ati, mɩɩn sʋan anianman sɔ'n ɛmɔ anwʋn ɛlɔ maan ɔ kan kele ɛmɔ kɛ yɛ tɩ akpɔlɛ, nán ɛmɔ ahʋnlɩn a tɔ bɛ́ kunnun b'a nyan anwʋnsɛlɛ.
hypothesis: E keti, me su ni amanso ni ema wu lo. Ma o kankire e mo ke ya ti akpole, na e ma hune ni ato be kunu, be nya awu sele.

reference: Sɩɛ Nyanmɩan Kpili nʋn yɛ́ Mɩn Zozi Kilisi cɩ́cɩ anianman'n-mɔ kʋalaa alʋa, bɛ mán bɛ nyán ehulo, ɔ nʋn dedi.
hypothesis: Sɛ ɛnyɛ amiamu pli, nɛ nyamiɛnzosɛ pli, cɛ cɛ anyama makwaalua, bɛma bɛnyɛ ɛhulo. Ɔnɔdɛ de.

reference: Bɛ́ kʋalaa mɔ bɛ le ehulo m'ɔ le man ayuelɩɛ bɛ kulo yɛ́ Mɩn Zozi Kilisi'n, Nyanmɩan nwún bɛ́ nwʋn anwunnvoe.
hypothesis: Bɛɛ kɔ ɑmɔ bɛlɛɛ hulɔ, mɔlɛ mɑ yɔliɑ, bɛɛ kulɛ yɑ mɛ zɔzi Krisin, nyɑmɩɛ nwu bɛ nwu ɑ nvɔi.

reference: O! Galasi amma ngʋasɩafʋɛ. Nwan yɛ̂ ɔ'a tʋ ɛmɔ ndɩnndan ɔ? Ɛmɔ sɩ yɩ́ yuein kɛ kʋlʋwa nɩn asʋ yɛ̂ bɛ bʋbɔlɩ Zozi Kilisi ɔ.
hypothesis: Oh, Galasi a mango a si a fuɛ. Ngua ye wa tu ɛmɔ n’ɛndɛ. Ɛmɔ si yɔ in kɛ kuluɔ ni aso, yɛbɛ bɔ bolizo zi krisi.

reference: Mɩn kulo kɛ mɩn bisa ɛmɔ kosuan baa kʋnmgba cein maan ɛmɔ bua mɩ́n bie. Nyanmɩan Wawɛ'n m'ɔ wɔ ɛmɔ anun'n, asʋ mala'n mɔ ɛmɔ a li sʋ'n yɛ̂ ɔ man ɛmɔ a nyan yɩ́ anaan Ɛjɔlɛkpa'n mɔ ɛmɔ a tɩ b'a le b'a li'n yɛ̂ ɔ man ɛmɔ a nyan yɩ́ ɔ?
hypothesis: m'ɛ kɔ kɛ m'ibisa ɛ mɔ kɔ suɔm b'akwɛm b'ɛ cɛi, ma ɛ mɔ bua m'ibiɛ. Nyame ɛ wae mɔ wua ɛ mɔ nwun. Aso m'ala mɔ ɛ mɔ Ali suɛni. Yɛ ɔma ɛ mɔ ɛnyɛ ayɛɛ, ana ɛ jwɛlɛkpa m'ɛ mɔ atɛ balibalin. Yɛ ɔma ɛ mɔ ɛnyɛ ayɛɛ.

reference: Ngɛlɛ yɛ̂ ɛmɔ nzɩ man anaan? Ɛmɔ le Nyanmɩan Wawɛ'n yɛ̂ ɛmɔ a bɔ yɩ́ bʋ. Sian dɩɛ, ɛmɔ kulo kɛ bɛ gua yɩ́ bʋ wɔ anwʋnnaan nun ɔ?
hypothesis: Ngelê ye mɔ nzi manna. Mɔ lɛ Nyame awa wan. Ye mɔ abɔɛ bɔ. Nasian deɛ, mɔ kurokɛ be gwaɛ bɔ wɔ ahunannu.

reference: Asʋ ɛmɔ a fɛ mgban ɔ? Atɩn nnʋn man ɛbɛlɛ kɛ ɔ yɔ́ sɔ.
hypothesis: so ɛma fɛ ngwao atɛ nɔ mɛbɛ kɛ oyɔ sɔ

reference: Nyanmɩan a fa yɩ́ Wawɛ'n ɔ'a man ɛmɔ. Ɔ yɔ asinbɛnwʋn ninnge ɛmɔ afian. Asʋ mala'n mɔ ɛmɔ di sʋ nɩn ati yɛ̂ ɔ yɔ sɔ anaan Ɛjɔlɛkpa'n mɔ ɛmɔ a tɩ b'a le b'a li nɩn ati ɔ?
hypothesis: Nyami a fɛ wawa nɛ wa ma ɛmɔ wa yɔ asimɛ wunungɛ ɛmɔ fia. Nso malama ɛmɔ di sunia ti yɛ ɔyɔ sɔ. Anaa ayɔ kpanmɔ ɛmɔ atɛ bali bali ni atia.

reference: Ɛ 'nwun ɛjɔlɛ mɔ b'a hɛlɛ wɔ Abalahamʋn anwʋn'n:
hypothesis: É wu Ɛjɔlɛ mɔɔ ba kɛlɛ ɛwɔ Abrahamu awɔn.

reference: Yɩ́ ti, ɛmɔ tɩ́ yɩ́ bʋ kɛ bɛ́ mɔ bɛ de Nyanmɩan bɛ di'n, bɛ́ yɛ̂ bɛ tɩ Abalahamʋn amma kpa nɩn ɔ.
hypothesis: yiri, èmmàtèbòkè. bè mò bɛ̀ dɛ Nyame àmɛ̀dìn. Bɛyɛ̀ bɛtɛ Abraham ammakpa ni.

reference: Afɩ Ɛhɛlɛ Ɛjɔlɛ'n lɛ kele kɛ, bɛ́ mɔ bɛ tɩ man Zufʋ'n, Nyanmɩan 'nɩan bɛ́ dedi nɩn anwʋn ɔ bu bɛ́ sɛsɛfʋɛ. Ɛhɩka ati yɛ̂ Nyanmɩan lili mʋa ɔ bɔlɩ Ɛjɔlɛkpa sɔ'n ɔ helelɩ Abalahamʋn kɛ:
hypothesis: A fe a keleke. Ben mo beti mo zu fun. Nyami ania be de dini a o. Obu besese fuo e. Ei kati yie nyami e lili mo a, obo li a joro pasani o heli abraham e.

reference: Kɛmɔ Abalahamʋn lelɩ Nyanmɩan lili, mɔ Nyanmɩan 'yeyilalɩ yɩ́'n, ɔ man bɛ́ kʋalaa mɔ bɛ de Nyanmɩan bɛ di'n, Nyanmɩan yeyila bɛ́ kɛ ɔ yeyilalɩ Abalahamʋn'n.
hypothesis: kɛmɔ Abraham lɛlɛ yanyi mɛn Lili, mɔnyanyi yɛi yila yɛn ɔmɛ bɛkwa mɔ bɛde nyamiɛn bɛdin, nyamiɛn yɛila bɛkɛ ɔyɛila Abraham.

reference: Nan bɛ́ mɔ bɛ susu bɛ́ ti bɛ gua mala nɩn asʋ'n, munnzue yɛ̂ b'a fa ɔ. Afɩ b'a hɛlɛ wɔ Ɛhɛlɛ Ɛjɔlɛ nɩn anun kɛ:
hypothesis: Na bɛ mo bɛ su bɛ ti bɛ gwa malan ia so ni. Mu zo yɛ ba fa o. A fɛ ba kɛlɛ wɛ, ɛ kɛlɛ jɔ ni a nu kɛ

reference: Sɛ ɛmɔ fa bɛ́ nyɩn bɛ tʋ a, ɛmɔ nwun yɩ́ yuein kɛ, Nyanmɩan anyunnun, sʋanlan ngʋala man kɛ ɔ di mala nɩn asʋ ɔ kaci sɛsɛfʋɛ ɔ. Ɔ sanlɩn kɛ Ɛhɛlɛ Ɛjɔlɛ'n lɛ kele kɛ:
hypothesis: Se m'aba nyin bɛ to, m'awu yi ywe yi n kɛ, Nyame ayunu, sɔan gwa amake odi marani asɔ ɔkɛ cisɛsɛ fɔɔ. Osani kɛ, ehe ajɔi nɛkɛ le kɛ

reference: Mala'n nʋn dedi'n tɩ man kʋn. Nan Ɛhɛlɛ Ɛjɔlɛ'n lɛ kele kɛ:
hypothesis: Manan ndé dité man kon, na ékré jô é lé klé klé.

reference: Nan mala nɩn asʋ munnzue'n m'ɔ di kɛ ɔ kan yɛ́'n, Kilisi a fa munnzue sɔ'n ɔ'a le yɛ́ ti. Ɛhɛlɛ Ɛjɔlɛ lɛ kele kɛ:
hypothesis: Na mala nya sumu zue mo dike o kan yen. Kli si afa muzue so ne wale yeti. Ekele jo ile kele ke.

reference: Ɛjɔlɛ sɔ nɩn a kpɩn sʋ. Ɔ sanlɩn kɛ, Zozi Kilisi dunman nun, Nyanmɩan nyila nɩn a han bɛ́ mɔ bɛ tɩ man Zufʋ'n kɛ ɔ falɩ bɔlɩ Abalahamʋn anɔhʋba'n. Yɩ́ ti, dedi'n y'ɔ man yɛ nyan Wawɛ Nwannzan-nwannzan'n mɔ Nyanmɩan a fa a bɔ yɛ́ anɔhʋba nɩn ɔ.
hypothesis: E jɔra fɔn n'a kyiɛn sɔ, o san n'i kɛ, Zozo Kirisi dumanu, Nyami a nyin a na, ã han bɛ mɔ bɛ ti mɛnzu fɔ n'i kɛ ɔ fa abɔre Abraham ana hɔ bani. Yiti de din, yɔma yɛ nyin a wawɔ wɔnsawɔnsani mɔ Nyami a afa abɔ yɛ ana hɔ bani o.

reference: Anianman-mɔ, ɔ tɩ eyuadɩ nɩn anun ɛwa nvandʋhʋn. Nvandʋhʋn sɔ'n y'ɔ le kɛ, sɛ sʋanlan kʋn kɛlɛ ajâ kalata kɛ ɔ sɛ fata'n sie ɛbɛlɛ a, sʋanlan fɩ́ɩ́ le man atɩn ɔ mgbɔ man ɛjɔlɛ sɔ'n, ɛsɛ ɔ le man atɩn ɔ ndʋ man ɛjɔlɛ sɔ nɩn asʋ.
hypothesis: Aniamanmo, o ti e yua di ni na un va ndokun. Vandonun sun anio le ke, se sun akun ke le ajia karata ke ose fata ni sie e bela, sun anfi le ma atin, ongbo ma ejolo sun, ese o le ma atin, ondoma ejolo sun an sun.

reference: Kɛ ɛjɔlɛ'n tɩ yɩ́ nɩn anɩn. Nyanmɩan bɔlɩ Abalahamʋn nʋn yɩ́ bʋsʋ sʋanlan nɩn anɔhʋba. Ɛhɛlɛ Ɛjɔlɛ'n ngan man kɛ: “Abalahamʋn nʋn yɩ́ bʋsʋ menian'n-mɔ” kɛ like mɔ bɛ sʋnlɩn ɔ. Nan yɩ́ nwan: “Ɛ nʋn wɔ́ bʋsʋ sʋanlan.” Ɛbɛlɛ nɩn anun, yɛ nwun yɩ́ kɛ, yɩ́ bʋsʋ sʋanlan sɔ'n y'ɔ le Kilisi.
hypothesis: Kɛ ɛ jwɛlɛ teni anɛ, nyamiamɔblɛ Abraham no yɛ bɔ sɔsɔna ni anɔhuba, ɛhɛlɛ jwɛlɛ nɛ ngama kɛ Abraham no yɛ bɔ sɔsɔ mini anɔmɔ, kɛlikɛ mɔ bɛ sɔnni ɔ. Nanyua ɛnɛ wa bɔ sɔsɔna nɛ. Ɛbɛlɛ ni ɛnu, yɛ wu kɛ yɛ bɔ sɔsɔn ni, yoli kɛli si

reference: Mɔ mɩɩn kan'n y'ɔ le kɛ Nyanmɩan nʋn Abalahamʋn bɛ yɔlɩ nyɩhyɛ bɛ sielɩ. Ɔ sanlɩn kɛ ɔ bɔlɩ Abalahamʋn anɔhʋba yɩ́ nzin afʋɛ ɛya nnan abulasan kʋalaaka nán ɔ'a fa mala'n ɔ'a man Moyizɩ. Mala'n ngʋala man kɛ ɔ kpɔ ɛjɔlɛ sɔ'n ɔ man anɔhʋba'n mɔ Nyanmɩan bɔlɩ'n ka.
hypothesis: Mame kɛn yɛlɛ kɛ, Nyameano Abraham, bɛ yɔle ye sieɛ bɛ sieele, ɔsan kɛ ɔbɔle Abraham anɔhoba yizi afuɛ ɛya nna Abulasan kɔ a ka na wafa Malan wa ma Moyizi, malɛ ngwa ma kɛ ɔkɔ ɛjɔlɛ swɛn, ɔma anɔhoba mmɔ Nyameano bɔlɛn ka.

reference: Afɩ ajâ'n mɔ Nyanmɩan sie'n, sɛ mala'n y'ɔ man bɛ nyan yɩ́ a, anɩn anɔhʋba ɛjɔlɛ nnʋn man nun kʋ́n. Nan kʋsʋ, anɔhʋba'n mɔ Nyanmɩan bɔlɩ Abalahamʋn'n, yɩ́ ti y'ɔ man ɔ nwunlin yɩ́ nwʋn anwunnvoe ɔ.
hypothesis: A fe agya, mo nya me nsian, se mmaran yi yo ma aben ya, ane a nna ma agyala nu mo nuko, na koso, a nna ma manyame abole Abrahama, yi ti yo ma owuni yi woho.

reference: Sɛ ɛjɔlɛ'n tɩ sʋa a, anɩn nzukɛ ati yɛ̂ Nyanmɩan falɩ mala'n manlɩn bɛ́ ɔ? Nyanmɩan falɩ mala'n manlɩn bɛ́ maan bɛ nwun yɩ́ kɛ menian'n-mɔ nyɔlɩɛ'n nzɔ man yɩ́ nyɩn. Mala sɔ'n lalɩ ɛbɛlɛ dede ɔ juli Abalahamʋn abʋsʋ sʋanlan'n, mɔ yɩ́ ti yɛ̂ Nyanmɩan bɔlɩ yɩ́ anɔhʋba nɩn ɛwalɛ tɛmʋn. Nyanmɩan sʋanlɩn yɩ́ mmɔfʋɛ'n-mɔ maan bɛ nʋn mala'n walɩ, ɔ nanndɩ sʋanlan kʋn m'ɔ di asafian nɩn asʋ.
hypothesis: Sɛ ɛjoran te sua, anrɛɛ si ka ti yɛ Nyame afalɛ mmaraneɛ manɛ bɔ. Nyame afalɛ mmaraneɛ manɛ bɛ, mmaran bɛ wuiɛ kɛ, menye anwomua nwoaliɛ anzɔ ma ayɛ nyɛ. Mmaran sɔne lali bɛ dɛdɛɛ, ɔduri Abraha abosɔsoan, moyi di yɛ Nyame abɔlɛyɛ anahoba ne walaɛ tɛ mu. Nyame asoɛ ne mmafoɛ ne mmo, mmaran bɛ no mmaranɛ woli, mɔnandeɛ sɔnkumo di asafianɛ asɔ.

reference: Sʋanlan'n m'ɔ di asafian'n, nán sʋanlan kʋnmgba ati ɛjɔlɛ y'ɔ di ɔ, nan anɔhʋba'n mɔ Nyanmɩan bɔlɩ'n, yɩ́ muonun y'ɔ lili nun ɛjɔlɛ nɩn ɔ.
hypothesis: Sɔɔnɔ mɔ̀ɔ̀ dì Asafian, nà sɔɔnɔ kɔngbàtì jwɔlɛ yòò dìɔ. Nà anɔhɔbàlmɔ̀ Nyamèà bɔ̀ɔ̀lɛn yì mɔ̀ nù, yɔlìlìnù ɛ̀ jwɔlɛ nni.

reference: Asʋ, like mɔ Nyanmɩan kɔ bɔ anɔhʋba kɛ ɔ 'yɔ'n, mala'n kʋala kɛ ɔ totua yɩ́ atɩn ɔ? Cɛcɛ! Ɔ sanlɩn kɛ, sɛ mala kʋn wɔ ɛbɛlɛ m'ɔ man sʋanlan nyan ngʋan an, ahan mala'n kʋala kɛ ɔ man sʋanlan kaci sɛsɛfʋɛ wɔ Nyanmɩan anyunnun.
hypothesis: Mɛ asoɛlɛ kɛɛ mɔɔ nyameɛ miinli akɔ bɔ anahɔvakɛ ɔyɛɛn. Mɛɛla ne kwaakeɛ ɔtɔ tu ayia tiɔ. Kɛɛkɛɛ. Osani kɛɛ sɛ mɛɛla kunwɔbɛma mɛ asoɛlɛ nyangoɛ. Aha mɛɛla ne kwaakeɛ. Ɔmasoɛɛ kɛɛkɛɛ cisɛsɛ fuɛ wɔ nyameɛ nwun.

reference: Nan Ɛhɛlɛ Ɛjɔlɛ'n lɛ kele kɛ ɛtɛ nɩn a fa yɩ́ sa a tʋ yɛ́ kʋalaa yɛ́ sʋ. Ɔ man bɛ́ mɔ bɛ le dedi'n, bɛ́ dedi'n mɔ bɛ le yɩ́ wɔ Zozi Kilisi anun'n dunman nun, bɛ nyan anɔhʋba'n mɔ Nyanmɩan bɔlɩ nɩn anun like.
hypothesis: Na eha la ɔ jae nyi kili kɛɛ, etɛ ninyia fai sa ato ya kwaya sɔɔ, ɔ maba mɔ bɛlɛ de dini, bɛdini mɔ bɛlɛ i wuo Jesu Kristi annu ni dumɔnu, bɛ nya anokoba mɔ nyame ya bolɛ ni anu likɛ.

reference: Asannan nán dedi'n tɛmʋn a ju sʋ'n, anɩn yɛ wɔ mala nɩn asa abʋ. Anɩn yɛ lɛ nwʋnndɛ dedi'n m'ɔ di kɛ bɛ yɩ bɛ kele'n
hypothesis: Asa na n'adede dini ntamɔ ajusɔn, ané yɛ wɔ mralɛ asabɔ, ané yɛlɛ wɔ n'adede dini, mɔdikɛba yibɛ kɛlɛ.

reference: Ɔ man mala'n tɩ kɛ sʋanlan m'ɔ lɛ di yɛ́ taataa fa yɛ́ wula Kilisi asa nun, nán dedi'n mɔ yɛ le yɩ́ nɩn a man y'a kaci sɛsɛfʋɛ wɔ Nyanmɩan anyunnun.
hypothesis: Mamman lannintékè, sɔmɔlɔ di yɛ tatɛ, fayɛwula krisi asanu, nadidini mɔyɛlɛinɛ amaya ka cisɛsɛ fwɛ, wanyami anyunu.

reference: Ɛnɛ mɔ yɛ wɔ dedi mɛlɛ nɩn anun'n, yɛ nnʋn man mala nɩn asa abʋ kʋ́n.
hypothesis: Ɛna mma ya wɛdi di mɛlɛ ni annu. Ya nna mma mɛlɛ ni asabokɔ.

reference: Afɩ, ɛmɔ nʋn Zozi Kilisi b'a yɔ kʋn, ɛmɔ dedi nɩn ati, ɛmɔ a kaci Nyanmɩan amma.
hypothesis: À fɛ amanɔn zɔɔ si krisibayɔ kɔn. Ɛmɔ dɛdi nianti, ɛmɔ ka chinyami ama.

reference: Ɛmɔ kʋalaatin mɔ b'a sɔnɩn ɛmɔ, mɔ ɛmɔ nʋn Kilisi b'a yɔ kʋn'n, ɛmɔ asɩtanlan nɩn a yɔ kɛ Kilisi dɩɛ nɩn ala.
hypothesis: Mɛ mɛ kɔ adima ba sɔnɛ ɛmɔ ɛnɛ. Mɔ ɛmɔ nu krisi ba yɔ kɔn. Ɛmɔ asɛ tani ayɔkɛ krisi diɛnɛ ara.

reference: Yɩ́ ti, kɩkaala dɩɛ, Zufʋ o, m'ɔ tɩ man Zufʋ o, kanga o, m'ɔ tɩ man kanga o, belenzua o, balasua o, mgbacɩ mgbacɩɛ nnʋn man bɛ́ afian kʋ́n. Ɔ sanlɩn kɛ ɛmɔ nʋn Zozi Kilisi a yɔ kʋn.
hypothesis: yiti, kɛ kala diɛn, zufuɔ, matɛma zufuɔ, kangaɔ, matɛma kangaɔ, belɛn zuɔ, bala zuɔ, makɛreɛn makɛreɛn ɔ ma bɛ afianɔ osan kɛ, ɛmɔn ɔ jozikrisi, ayɔkɔ

reference: Sɛ ɛmɔ tɩ Kilisi dɩɛ a, anɩn ɛmɔ tɩ Abalahamʋn amma. Like mɔ Nyanmɩan falɩ bɔlɩ Abalahamʋn anɔhʋba'n, ɔ tɩ ɛmɔ dɩɛ.
hypothesis: E mɔti Kristo deɛ, na ɛmɔti Abrahamu ama, nti ɛma Onyame ama abɔ Abrahamu anohuban. Ɔte ɛmɔ deɛ.

reference: Ɛhɩ, anianman-mɔ, sɛ sʋanlan kʋn tɔ ɛtɛ nɩn anun nán ɛmɔ nwun yɩ́ a, ɛmɔ mɔ Wawɛ Nwannzan-nwannzan'n wɔ bɛ́ nun'n, ɛmɔ fá ahʋnlɩn bɛtɛɛ bɛ síe yɩ́ atɩn kpa nɩn asʋ. Wɔ́ mɔ ɛ lɛ bʋka yɩ́'n, síe wɔ́ nwʋn ye nán a ndɔ man ɛtɛ nɩn anun.
hypothesis: Bɛnniɛn yi ama mɔ, sɛɛsɔɔ akɔntɔ, ɛtɛɛnɛ nnu na ɛmɔ nwiɛ, ɛmɔmɔ wawa wan-sa-wan-sa nɔ wɔbɛnnu, ɛmɔ fa ahunrɛ bɛtɛɛ, bɛsie yi atɛnkpa ne asɔ, wɔmɔ ɛlɛbɔ kai, siɔ nwiɛ, na andɔma ɛtɛɛnɛ nnu.
